title: Chamundeshwari Temple
tagline: Chamundeshwari Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Chamundeshwari Temple is a Hindu temple located on the top of Chamundi Hills about 13 km from the palace city of Mysuru in the state of Karnataka in India.
overview.description: The Chamundeshwari Temple is a Hindu temple located on the top of Chamundi Hills about 13 km from the palace city of Mysuru in the state of Karnataka in India. The temple was named after Chamundeshwari or, the fierce form of Shakti, a tutelary deity held in reverence for centuries by the Maharaja of Mysuru. Chamundeshwari is called by the people of Karnataka as Nada Devi (ನಾಡ ದೇವಿ), which means state Goddess. It is situated at the elevation of around 3300 ft from the mean sea level.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chamundi Hills
topPlaces.description: The Chamundi Hill is located 13 km east of Mysore, Karnataka, India. The name comes from the Chamundeshwari Temple at the peak.

topPlaces.name: Rajendra Vilas
topPlaces.description: The Rajendra Vilas is a palace-hotel atop Chamundi Hills in Mysore, Karnataka, India. It is now closed and in a state of neglect and can only be visited with prior permission.

topPlaces.name: Anjali Ashram, Mysore
topPlaces.description: Anjali Ashram is a Christian retreat in Mysore city in the Karnataka province of India.

topPlaces.name: Madhuvana Mysore Royal Cemetery
topPlaces.description: Madhuvana Mysore Royal Cemetery (Kannada: ಮೈಸೂರಿನ ರಾಜವಂಶಸ್ಥರ ಸಮಾಧಿ ಮಧುವನಕ್ಕೆ ಜೀರ್ಣೋದ್ಧಾರ) is a site in Mysuru where many members of the Wadiyar royal family were cremated. It is located on Mysuru-Nanjangud road, and is on five acres of land.

topPlaces.name: Vidyaranyapuram
topPlaces.description: Vidyaranyapuram is a suburb of Mysore City in the Karnataka state of India.

topPlaces.name: Mysore Sand Sculpture Museum
topPlaces.description: Mysore Sand Sculpture Museum is the first sand sculpture museum in India, located in Mysore, Karnataka. It was inaugurated in 2014, with 150 sand sculptures on display, on a one-acre land at the base of Chamundi Hills.

topPlaces.name: Chamundipuram
topPlaces.description: Chamundipura is a suburb of Mysore city in Karnataka state, India.

topPlaces.name: Mall of Mysore
topPlaces.description: Mall of Mysore is a shopping mall which is one of the largest and the first of its kind in the Indian city of Mysore, Karnataka. It is located next to the Mysore Racecourse, with the Chamundi hills as a backdrop.

items.note: The Chamundi Hill is located 13 km east of Mysore, Karnataka, India. The name comes from the Chamundeshwari Temple at the peak.
The Rajendra Vilas is a palace-hotel atop Chamundi Hills in Mysore, Karnataka, India. It is now closed and in a state of neglect and can only be visited with prior permission.

itinerary.title: Day 2 — Madhuvana Mysore Royal Cemetery & around

items.note: Madhuvana Mysore Royal Cemetery (Kannada: ಮೈಸೂರಿನ ರಾಜವಂಶಸ್ಥರ ಸಮಾಧಿ ಮಧುವನಕ್ಕೆ ಜೀರ್ಣೋದ್ಧಾರ) is a site in Mysuru where many members of the Wadiyar royal family were cremated. It is located on Mysuru-Nanjangud road, and is on five acres of land.
Vidyaranyapuram is a suburb of Mysore City in the Karnataka state of India.

Mysore Sand Sculpture Museum is the first sand sculpture museum in India, located in Mysore, Karnataka. It was inaugurated in 2014, with 150 sand sculptures on display, on a one-acre land at the base of Chamundi Hills.
Chamundipura is a suburb of Mysore city in Karnataka state, India.

Mall of Mysore is a shopping mall which is one of the largest and the first of its kind in the Indian city of Mysore, Karnataka. It is located next to the Mysore Racecourse, with the Chamundi hills as a backdrop.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chamundeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chamundeshwari Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chamundeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (5 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (5 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chamundeshwari Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chamundeshwari Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chamundeshwari Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chamundeshwari Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chamundeshwari Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chamundi Hills, Rajendra Vilas, Anjali Ashram, Mysore, Madhuvana Mysore Royal Cemetery, Vidyaranyapuram.
